title: diatithemai #1303
definition:
1) to arrange, dispose of, one's own affairs
    1a) of something that belongs to one
    1b) to dispose of by will, make a testament
 2) to make a covenant, enter into a covenant, with one
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to arrange, dispose of, one's own affairs
    1a) of something that belongs to one
    1b) to dispose of by will, make a testament
 2) to make a covenant, enter into a covenant, with one

    NASB:  to place separately, i.e. dispose of by a will:
